title: What To Expect From SNDL Inc (SNDL) Q3 2024 Earnings
text: SNDL Inc is preparing to announce third-quarter 2024 results on November 5, 2024. Analysts anticipate quarterly revenue of approximately $167.19 million with earnings projected at -$0.04 per share. For the full year, consensus expectations show revenue of $659.97 million and break-even earnings per share. Notably, revenue estimates for SNDL Inc for the full year 2024 have declined from $673.93 million to $659.97 million over the past 90 days, indicating downward revisions. The company missed expectations in the prior quarter, with actual revenue of $163.78 million falling short of the $172.59 million forecast. The stock declined 4.52% following that earnings release. Two analysts currently cover the stock with an average price target of $3.61, suggesting potential upside of approximately 71% from the current $2.11 price level. The consensus recommendation indicates Outperform status.
